description_long: This helicopter features a futuristic, angular design with a dark navy blue body accented by red and light gray highlights. Its main structure is broad and flat, with two prominent, forward-swept arms that extend outward and downward, each tipped with thick, rectangular rotor housings. The central fuselage is streamlined, with a pointed nose and a segmented, ribbed section along the top, suggesting advanced aerodynamics and possible weapon or sensor mounts. The cockpit area is sharply faceted, with a geometric, mask-like appearance, and the rear section is wide, with no visible tail rotor, indicating a possible coaxial or ducted fan configuration. The overall aesthetic is aggressive and high-tech, suitable for urban patrol or tactical deployment. The surface finish is sleek, with minimal visible seams or rivets, and the color scheme enhances its stealthy, modern look.
description: A futuristic, angular helicopter with a dark navy blue body, red accents, and broad, forward-swept arms ending in thick rotor housings. Its streamlined, faceted cockpit and aggressive design suggest advanced technology and urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat, elongated body, forward-swept arms, and thick rotor housings; the ribbed top section and pointed nose are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the faceted, mask-like cockpit, wide stance of the arms, and the symmetry of the rotor housings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the arm structure and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad, flat tail section, the ribbed top, and the absence of a traditional tail rotor.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four main rotor blades, each long and rectangular with a dark blue color and red striping; blades appear to be made of composite material and are integrated into the forward-swept arms.
attribute_tail_rotor: Not visible; the helicopter appears to lack a traditional tail rotor, possibly using a ducted fan or coaxial system.
attribute_landing_skids: Two robust, angular landing skids extend downward from the main body, colored dark blue with red highlights; they are thick and appear reinforced, with no visible crossbars.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Two large, sharply faceted cockpit windows at the front, forming a V-shape; windows are tinted dark, with angular framing and no visible markings.
